creator: p.christias@noc.ntua.gr
text:
The current version of the FreeBSD Project favicon (*) has only 256 colors and no alpha channel transparency. As a result, it looks somewhat choppy in every modern web browser.

* http://www.freebsd.org/favicon.ico
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/www/en/favicon.ico

Fix: 

I have prepared a new 24 bit version of the FreeBSD Project favicon. It is available at:

http://noc.ntua.gr/~christia/freebsd-favicon-24bit.ico

Feel free to use it as you wish.

Regards,
Panagiotis
How-To-Repeat: Visit the FreeBSD Project website using a modern web browser and check the way the favicon is rendered.
